description: The ConstantLerpValue component will make the ``Value`` reach ``TargetValue``, making ``Speed`` progress per second. it can also be known as a linear lerp.

fields.Speed: The amount to change ``Value`` by per second to reach ``TargetValue``
fields.WriteBack: Whether changes to ``Value`` will be written to ``TargetValue``. See write backs.
fields.Value: The value to constantly progress towards ``TargetValue``
